arts.ttl: Mark Guidi shares 'the chat' he's heard about Brendan Rodgers extending his Celtic contract
arts.sum: But with Rodgers’ own contract expiring in just under 18 months, are Celtic looking to get around the table with the Parkhead boss to see if he is open to extending his own stay in Paradise? Dermot Desmond ‘starting to open dialogue’ about extending Brendan Rodgers’ Celtic contract

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's three words sent shockwaves through devastated Man Utd dressing room
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson didn't go easy on his players after their devastating Premier League title defeat to Manchester City in 2012

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers addresses 'interesting' comments he's heard about Celtic's form this season
arts.sum: The Bhoys’ draw with Dundee United was only the second time Brendan Rodgers has watched his Celtic team drop points this season. Prior to that, Celtic’s 2-2 draw with Aberdeen was the first time the Hoops failed to collect all three points as their relentless start to defending their title continues this season.

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI vs St Johnstone as Brendan Rodgers set to juggle squad selection
arts.sum: On the other hand, St Johnstone are bottom of the Scottish Premiership coming into this one and find themselves two points adrift following a loss in the Tayside Derby. Celtic take on St Johnstone this Sunday in their final Scottish Premiership match of 2024 before the New Year celebrations allow a brief moment of reflection.

arts.ttl: 'They're going to'... Kris Boyd's big Celtic prediction that will worry Rangers fans
arts.sum: After Celtic beat Rangers in the League Cup final on the 15th of December, the Parkhead club’s fixtures list meant that Brendan Rodgers had to negotiate four Scottish Premiership fixtures in twelve days including another Glasgow Derby at Ibrox. At the moment Celtic sit 12 points ahead of Rangers in the Scottish Premiership table with one game still to play before the big New Year Glasgow Derby .

arts.ttl: Celtic stars react to thrashing Motherwell on social media as Bhoys extend Premiership gap
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel and Adam Idah react to Celtic victory Taking to Instagram, Schmeichel made it clear that there was nowhere else he would’ve rather been on Boxing Day with a simple message to supporters after another impressive display.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels savouring Celtic view from the top but warns against wandering eyes with Rangers in sight
arts.sum: The Belgian is settling in nicely after record breaking move from the Bundesliga despite spell out of the side

arts.ttl: 3 Celtic stars lead Player of the Year race and trio could hammer final nail in Philippe Clement's coffin - Saturday Jury
arts.sum: The Rangers boss is toiling and the Belgian won't be relishing a clash against their fierce rivals

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement is on cliff edge and Brendan Rodgers could push him into the abyss - Chris Sutton
arts.sum: The former Hoops hero striker reckons defeat in the Ne'erday derby could spell the end for the beleaguered Belgian

arts.ttl: Man United's 'Scrooge' co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe 'cancels £40,000 charity donation for club legends' in multi-billionaire's latest penny-pinching after sacking Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: The Association of Former Manchester United Players was founded in 1985 to support players who did not make the mouthwatering salaries of the modern era.
